# CMYKForge

> CMYKForge is local-first software in active development for preparing image-based, multi-material color FDM 3D printing workflows.

CMYKForge Standard focuses on CMYK and optional white filament planning, color-aware model generation, previews, printability checks, and slicer-compatible export. Features, compatibility, and availability may change before release.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://cmykforge.org/): Product overview, real-print evidence, methodology, and frequently asked questions.
- [CMYKForge Standard](https://cmykforge.org/standard.html): Detailed workflow, current capabilities, requirements, compatibility, and beta updates.
- [Products](https://cmykforge.org/shop.html): Current and planned CMYKForge product editions.
- [About](https://cmykforge.org/about.html): Mission, development approach, and roadmap.
- [Development log](https://cmykforge.org/devlog.html): Dated project updates and milestones.

## Contact

- Email: admin@cmykforge.org
